description: Execute iterative refinement workflows with validation loops until quality criteria are met

evals.prompt: How do I set up an iterative refinement loop for code quality improvement?
evals.expected_output: Iterative refinement configuration with quality criteria and max iterations

evals.prompt: How does the refinement loop determine when to stop iterating?
evals.expected_output: Convergence criteria: quality threshold reached, max iterations, no improvement

evals.prompt: How can I use iterative refinement for test-fix cycles?
evals.expected_output: Test-fix refinement loop with test execution and code fixing

evals.prompt: How do I provide feedback between refinement iterations?
evals.expected_output: Feedback mechanism for steering refinement direction

evals.prompt: How can I track metrics during the refinement process?
evals.expected_output: Refinement metrics tracking: iterations, quality scores, time per iteration
